products.name: Monterey Futon Frame
products.description: The Monterey futon frame features a clean mission-style design with straight lines and a comfortable arm height. Available in Night & Day's standard finishes with Full and Queen sizes. Features the classic body design that converts easily between sofa and bed positions.

products.name: Sunrise Futon Frame
products.description: The Sunrise futon frame features a distinctive tray-top arm design perfect for drinks and remotes. Night & Day Furniture's elegant design with traditional woodworking and plantation-grown materials. Available in Chair, Full, and Queen sizes.

products.name: Dillon Futon Frame
products.description: The Dillon futon frame offers a sleek contemporary profile with gently curved arms. Crafted from quality hardwoods with Night & Day's signature finish options. Converts smoothly between sofa and bed positions.

products.name: Lambton Futon Frame
products.description: The Lambton futon frame combines modern aesthetics with traditional craftsmanship. Features a distinctive arm design and solid wood construction from plantation-grown materials.

products.name: Autumn Futon Frame
products.description: The Autumn futon frame showcases a warm, inviting design with gently curved lines. Built from quality hardwoods with Night & Day Furniture's standard finish options and 3-year warranty.

products.name: Black Pepper Futon Frame
products.description: The Black Pepper platform bed is part of Night & Day Furniture's Spices Bedroom Collection. Features solid Malaysian rubberwood construction with a clean modern headboard design. Available in Twin through King sizes with optional storage drawers.

products.name: Galena Futon Frame
products.description: The Galena futon frame offers a distinctive arm profile with clean lines. Crafted with Night & Day Furniture's quality construction methods and available in multiple finish options.

products.name: Trinity Futon Frame
products.description: The Trinity futon frame features a bold arm design with a distinctive panel style. Available with Night & Day's Classic or Moon Glider body in Full and Queen sizes. Traditional woodworking with plantation-grown materials.

products.name: Winchester Futon Frame
products.description: The Winchester futon frame combines rustic charm with modern comfort. Features a wide panel arm design that's both stylish and functional. Night & Day Furniture quality with 3-year warranty.

products.name: Rosemary Futon Frame
products.description: Have you ever noticed that rosemary will grow nearly anywhere, in nearly any environment? And it adds great taste to whatever it's combined with. That's one attractive, tough and versatile ingredient. Similarities to our Rosemary bed are absolutely striking. A platform bed with sturdy support, storage space below, and a stylish rattan headboard. The Rosemary Bed is a dual system frame using universal bed rails and can be assembled as a high (K-Series) or low (P-Series) platform bed. Does not require a box spring.

sustainability.materialSource: Solid Malaysian rubberwood sourced from managed rubber tree plantations; certified renewable resource

products.materials: Solid Malaysian rubberwood from managed plantations

products.name: Bali Futon Frame
products.description: The Bali futon frame offers a traditional slatted arm design that continues down the arm to encapsulate the sides. This frame is available with the Nesting Body Classic Design that features three positions: sofa, reclined, and bed. The arm is 2-1/2 inches wide and 23.6 inches tall, featuring a shutter style with a double row of 7 slats separated by a middle wooden piece.

sustainability.materialSource: Quality solid hardwoods with premium multi-step stain & lacquer processes

products.name: Flagstaff Futon Frame
products.description: The Flagstaff is part of the Arizona boutique line of hypo-allergenic futon mattresses by Otis Bed. These mattresses are available in retail stores only and feature premium foam construction that provides resiliency and comfort, is significantly lighter weight, and does not attract moisture and mildew.

sustainability.materialSource: Hypo-allergenic foam construction

products.name: Chandler Futon Frame
products.description: The Chandler is part of the Arizona boutique line of hypo-allergenic futon mattresses by Otis Bed. These mattresses are available in retail stores only and feature premium foam construction. Similar models in the line range from $479-$699 depending on size.

sustainability.materialSource: Hypo-allergenic foam construction

products.name: Pagoda Futon Frame
products.description: The Pagoda Futon Frame utilizes Wall Hugger technology that allows you to easily convert the frame from sofa to bed without moving the furniture away from the wall. Made from plantation grown rubberwood with a beautiful black walnut finish. Maximum weight capacity of 500 lbs (2 people, 250 lbs each).

sustainability.materialSource: Plantation grown rubberwood

products.name: Tamarind Futon Frame
products.description: The Tamarind Bed features a dual system using universal rails and can be assembled as a high (K-Series) or low (P-Series) platform bed. This frame does not require the use of a box spring underneath your mattress of choice. The platform is adjustable to two heights, either 15 inches or 12 inches from floor to top of slats.

sustainability.materialSource: Solid Malaysian rubberwood from managed plantations

products.materials: Solid Malaysian rubberwood from managed plantations

products.name: Haley 110 Futon Frame
products.description: A popular multi-purpose futon engineered for a medium-firm feel, with generous amounts of highly-resilient foam and polyester. 8-inch thickness (14 inches of overstuffed goods compressed to fit inside an 8-inch border). 9 inches of 2-pound density foam provides the ability to keep the mattress looking and feeling great. A 100% polyester fabric that breathes, stays cool and comfortable, and repels moisture. Designed for everyday use with 10-12+ year durability.

dimensions.note: 14 inches of overstuffed goods compressed to fit inside an 8-inch border

sustainability.materialSource: Highly resilient foam and polyester construction

products.name: Studio Futon Frame
products.description: The Studio futon frame provides a minimalist design ideal for apartments and small spaces. Compact footprint with Night & Day's quality construction standards.

products.name: Ruskin Futon Frame
products.description: The Ruskin Futon Frame is manufactured using quality solid hardwoods with a finishing process utilizing premium multi-step stain & lacquer processes. Features easy conversion with three comfort positions (sofa, recline, bed) and sofa height seating position. Available with MoonGlider or Classic body options.

sustainability.materialSource: Quality solid hardwoods with premium multi-step stain & lacquer processes

products.name: Northampton Futon Frame
products.description: The Northampton is part of the Arizona boutique line of hypo-allergenic futon mattresses by Otis Bed. These mattresses feature premium foam construction that provides resiliency and comfort, is significantly lighter weight, and does not attract moisture and mildew. Available in retail stores only.

sustainability.materialSource: Hypo-allergenic foam construction

products.name: Key West Futon Frame
products.description: The Key West will be perfect for your Florida sunroom. If you don't have one you'll feel like you do! These prime quality frames are made from the finest plantation-grown materials and are constructed with traditional woodworking good sense. The Key West arm is available in White finish, is 3.5" wide and 23" tall, and features 8 slats that form a slight arc bordered on each end by beveled decorative legs. Equipped with Bronze Shoe Fittings operating system for quick assembly and easy use.

sustainability.materialSource: Plantation-grown rubberwood

products.name: Tozi Futon Frame
products.description: The Tozi is a low-profile arm frame with a sleek accent piece that fits great in tight spaces and allows the cover to be the focal point of the design. Made from plantation-grown rubberwood, the Tozi utilizes Wall Hugger technology — easily convert from sofa to bed without moving the furniture away from the wall. Strata Furniture is the only Wall Hugger Futon with its Patented Mechanism. The maximum weight capacity of the frame is 500 lbs (250 lbs per side). Strata uses a Low VOC finish that is safe for organic homes.

sustainability.materialSource: Plantation-grown rubberwood, Low VOC finish safe for organic homes

products.name: Gemini Futon Frame
products.description: The Gemini II is an ultra-premium seating and sleeping futon mattress manufactured by Otis Bed. It is 8 inches thick and features a blend of high-quality 4 pound, 2.5 pound, and 2 pound flat and convoluted polyurethane foam to create a firm supportive core and the feel of a latex-like sleep surface. It likens the feel and durability of natural latex, but at about one-third the cost of 100% Natural Latex. 10-year warranty. Arizona boutique line — sold in retail store only at Carolina Futons.

sustainability.materialSource: Polyurethane foam blend (4 lb, 2.5 lb, 2 lb density). Made in USA by Otis Bed, Buffalo, New York.

products.name: Cambridge Futon Frame
products.description: The Cambridge futon frame features sturdy solid hardwood construction with a simple, traditional design. Side-loaded technology allows you to easily convert from sofa to full-size bed. Available in a honey oak finish.

sustainability.materialSource: Solid hardwood construction

products.name: Sedona Futon Frame
products.description: The Sedona is a hardwood futon frame by Kimberly Enterprises. Features durable hardwood construction with a weight capacity of up to 250 lbs for each futon side or 400 lbs total for 2 people. Available in Full and Queen sizes.

sustainability.materialSource: Hardwood construction by Kimberly Enterprises

products.name: Tiro Futon Frame
products.description: The Tiro features a mission-style arm that includes a beautifully designed folding tray table — the easiest way to make the most out of small spaces. Made from plantation-grown rubberwood, the Tiro utilizes Wall Hugger technology, allowing you to easily convert from sofa to bed without moving the furniture away from the wall. Strata Furniture is the only Wall Hugger Futon with its Patented Mechanism. Maximum weight capacity of the frame is 500 lbs (250 lbs per side). Strata uses a Low VOC finish that is safe for organic homes.

sustainability.materialSource: Plantation-grown rubberwood, Low VOC finish safe for organic homes

products.name: Yuma Futon Frame
products.description: The Yuma futon frame features a sturdy southwestern design. Quality construction from Night & Day Furniture with multiple finish and size options.

products.name: Fuji Futon Frame
products.description: The Fuji futon frame offers a sleek, Asian-inspired design with clean lines. Night & Day Furniture quality with Cherry and Dark Chocolate finish options.

products.name: Trelli Futon Frame
products.description: The Trelli futon frame features a lattice-inspired arm design that adds visual interest. Night & Day Furniture's quality construction with standard finish options.

products.name: Winter Futon Frame
products.description: The Winter futon frame features a clean, contemporary design with straight lines. Part of Night & Day Furniture's wall-hugger collection, maximizing space efficiency.

products.name: Paprika Futon Frame
products.description: The Paprika platform bed is part of Night & Day's Spices Bedroom Collection. Distinctive upholstered headboard with fabric options over solid Malaysian rubberwood frame. Available in multiple fabric/frame color combinations.

products.name: Tarragon Futon Frame
products.description: The Tarragon platform bed is part of Night & Day's Spices Bedroom Collection. Features a clean headboard design with solid Malaysian rubberwood construction. Available in Twin through King sizes.

products.name: Eureka Futon Frame
products.description: The Eureka futon frame features a bold, geometric arm design that makes a statement. Night & Day Furniture's quality construction with available in multiple finishes and sizes.

products.name: Alpine Futon Frame
products.description: The Alpine mattress by Otis Bed features a firm innerspring construction designed specifically for futon frames. Cotton and foam layers provide comfort while maintaining proper support for dual-use sofa/bed applications.

products.name: Thyme Futon Frame
products.description: The Thyme platform bed is part of Night & Day's Spices Bedroom Collection. Features a low-profile footboard design with clean modern lines. Solid Malaysian rubberwood with dual-system frame compatibility.

products.name: Asheville Futon Frame
products.description: The Asheville futon frame features a craftsman-inspired design with slatted arm panels. Night & Day Furniture's quality hardwood construction with smooth operating mechanism.

products.name: Rockwell Futon Frame
products.description: The Rockwell futon frame offers a modern industrial-inspired design. Quality hardwood construction with Night & Day Furniture's standard finishes and 3-year warranty.

products.name: Raleigh Futon Frame
products.description: The Raleigh futon frame combines Southern charm with practical design. Features a comfortable arm height and smooth conversion between sofa and bed positions.

products.name: Ekko Futon Frame
products.description: The Ekko platform bed by KD Frames features minimalist Scandinavian design with solid Tulip Poplar hardwood. NYT Wirecutter recommended. Made in Athens, Georgia, USA.

products.name: Albany Futon Frame
products.description: The Albany futon frame features a classic panel arm design that complements any room. Night & Day Furniture quality with Full and Queen sizes and multiple finish options.

products.name: Venice Futon Frame
products.description: The Venice futon frame offers an elegant European-inspired design. Clean lines and quality construction from Night & Day Furniture's plantation-grown materials.

products.name: Maricopa Futon Frame
products.description: The Maricopa futon frame features a southwestern-inspired design. Solid hardwood construction with Night & Day's signature quality and 3-year warranty.

products.name: Durango Futon Frame
products.description: The Durango futon frame brings rustic Western style to any room. Bold arm design with quality hardwood construction and smooth conversion mechanism.

contentPages.title: Carolina Futons | Futon Furniture
contentPages.description: Carolina Futons - Futon specialty store since 1991. Located at 824 Locust St, Ste 200, Hendersonville, NC 28792. Specializing in Night & Day, Strata, and KD futon frames, Murphy cabinet beds, platform beds, mattresses, and accessories.

contentPages.title: Futon Frames
contentPages.description: Night & Day, Strata, and KD Futon Frames. Front Loading (MoonGlider) and Nesting Body Futon Frames & Loungers. Available in multiple finishes and sizes.

contentPages.title: Platform Beds
contentPages.description: Platform Beds & Accessories from Night & Day Furniture's Spices Bedroom Collection and KD Frames. Solid hardwood construction, multiple size and finish options.

contentPages.title: Mattresses
contentPages.description: Futon mattresses including Otis Bed and Night & Day options. Designed for dual-use sofa/bed applications with proper support.

contentPages.title: Murphy Cabinet Beds
contentPages.description: Murphy Cabinet Beds from Night & Day Furniture. Space-saving solutions that look like furniture when closed. No wall mounting required.

contentPages.title: Casegoods & Accessories
contentPages.description: Bedroom furniture accessories including nightstands, dressers, chests, storage drawers, and trundle beds from Night & Day Furniture's Spices and Secrets collections.

contentPages.title: Wall Huggers
contentPages.description: Wall Hugger Futon Frames & Ottomans. Space-efficient designs that sit close to the wall in sofa position.

contentPages.title: Rustic Log Frames
contentPages.description: Rustic log futon frames including Wilderness, Northern Exposure, Mountainaire, and Denali models. Natural lodge-style furniture.

contentPages.title: Front Loading & Nesting
contentPages.description: Front Loading (MoonGlider) and Nesting Body futon frames. Different mechanism styles for converting between sofa and bed positions.

contentPages.title: Unfinished Wood
contentPages.description: Unfinished wood futon frames and loungers. KD Frames products in natural Tulip Poplar ready for custom finishing.

contentPages.title: Sales
contentPages.description: Current sales and promotions at Carolina Futons.

contentPages.title: Getting It Home
contentPages.description: Shipping and delivery information for Carolina Futons orders. Delivery options and rates.

contentPages.title: About Carolina Futons
contentPages.description: Carolina Futons has been a futon specialty store since 1991, owned by Brenda. Located in Hendersonville, NC in the Blue Ridge Mountains. Specializing in quality futon furniture from trusted manufacturers.

contentPages.title: FAQ
contentPages.description: Frequently asked questions about futon frames, mattresses, delivery, and care.

contentPages.title: Contact
contentPages.description: Contact Carolina Futons. 824 Locust St, Ste 200, Hendersonville, NC 28792.

contentPages.title: Choosing a Futon Frame
contentPages.description: Buying guide for selecting the right futon frame. Covers frame types, mechanisms, sizes, and finish options.

contentPages.title: Choosing a Futon Mattress
contentPages.description: Guide to selecting the right futon mattress. Covers firmness, materials, and sizing for different frame types.

contentPages.title: Blog
contentPages.description: Carolina Futons blog with articles about futon care, room design, and product guides.

contentPages.title: Shop
contentPages.description: Browse the complete Carolina Futons catalog. All categories: futon frames, platform beds, Murphy cabinet beds, mattresses, and accessories.
